name: Linear
description: Create issues, track sprints, manage your backlog
longDescription: Wire up Linear so the AI can file bugs from what it sees on a page, search and update issues, move tickets across your workflow, and summarize what's in flight for the current cycle.
author: BrowseCortex

apiKeyConfig.label: Linear API Key
apiKeyConfig.helperText: Create a personal API key in Linear settings

examplePrompts: File a bug for the layout glitch on this page
What issues are assigned to me this cycle?
Move issue ENG-204 to In Progress
Summarize what's left in the current sprint
Create a project for the redesign work
